title: (Bullish Signal) NVDA, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that NVDA's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 73 similar cases where NVDA's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 62 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $546.41 is above $541.06 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 11/03/20 - 12/04/20, the price experienced a +4% Uptrend. During the week of 11/27/20 - 12/04/20, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/r7o4woyhas361.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=0443ed07c31f3d6d1d13556244f635ff3995f071

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 04, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on NVDA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 62 of 73 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for NVDA just turned positive on December 02, 2020. Looking at past instances where NVDA's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 41 of 49 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

NVDA moved above its 50-day Moving Average on December 04, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +1.26% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where NVDA advanced for three days, in 301 of 353 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8149794-nvidia-nvda-542-33-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-dec-04-2020?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
